title: The Reply. (The Reproof.)
content:
Like Esop's lion, Burns says, sore I feel
        All others' scorn, but damn that ass's heel.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "The Reply. (The Reproof.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
